hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then uv run ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
FILES=$(ls tmp/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v '.gitkeep'); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: tmp/ not empty — process and clean up: $FILES" >&2; exit 2; fi

if [ -f scripts/last_review.json ]; then NEW=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('scripts/last_review.json')).get('new_findings',0))" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$NEW" -gt 0 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: $NEW review finding(s) pending. Read scripts/last_review.json, integrate into ROADMAP.md Known Issues, then run: python3 scripts/recheck_findings.py" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
